notes: Water Optimus grid with a Draconic Provenance. Staff of Repudiation T5 MH (beta + Extremity), Gospel of Water and Sky x2, Taisai Spirit Bow x2 (grand weapon-skill awakening lv4 - the reclassified bows), Rubea Stiria x2, Judgment of Torrential Tides ULB (Provenance; Inferno + Optimus telumas), Altruism-Soul Staff (celestial, weapon-atk lv5), Ultima Staff (gauph: Strength + delta + Tessera). Summons: Varuna 250 x2 (main+friend), subs Wamdus 4* (sub aura 40 -> optimus 460)/Belial/Princess Long Ji/Grand Order/Gabriel/Lucifer 250. MC job: Manadiver (staff+dagger, user-set) - the celestial staff's Ultimate Wisdom's Shine resolves at the staff tier. Optimus Teluma = SL-scaled Majesty on the chosen frame (atk+hp 20 @SL20, amplified: Might (108+20)x5.6+40=756.8, HP (24+20)x5.6+50=296.4). Provenance s1 = Progression 0.1%/turn/SL (EX; +2 at turn 1). DMG Cap Pen 5.5 = the T5 weapon (5JPIJg's 11 = two T5 weapons).
